title: SD-WAN
content: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Deep-Dive# Welcome to the SD-WAN course section. Here you will learn about the main architectural components of the Cisco SD-WAN solution.

title: How Cisco SD-WAN works?
content:
How Cisco SD-WAN works?# In the last lesson, we looked at the main architectural components of the Cisco SD-WAN solution.
Note: This is a demonstration page styled to look like NetworkAcademy.io.
Data Plane vs Control Plane# The separation of the data plane from the control plane is the foundational principle of Software-Defined Networking.
vSmart Controllers# vSmart controllers handle the control plane. They distribute routing information, policies, and security parameters across the SD-WAN fabric.
vEdge / cEdge Routers# These devices sit at the branches and handle the actual data plane, forwarding packets based on the policies distributed by the vSmart controllers.
vSmart <---- OMP ----> vEdgeSummary# Understanding the architecture is critical before diving into configuration.

title: Docs
